/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch x86_64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/example_app.dir/examples/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_app.dir/examples/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_app.dir/examples/map_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_app.dir/examples/telemetry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example_app.dir/examples/gui_app.cpp.o -o example_app -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks   -L/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib libimgui.a libimplot.a /usr/local/lib/libzmq.dylib /usr/local/opt/libpq/lib/libpq.dylib libimgui.a /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib -framework OpenGL /usr/local/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib -framework OpenGL
